headline: Strategic Acquisitions Power Long-Term Growth for Willis Towers Watson
summary: WTW ramps up growth via acquisitions, boosting AI and global reach as strategic deals enhance capabilities and expand into high-margin markets.

raw.headline: Strategic Acquisitions Power Long-Term Growth for Willis Towers Watson

headline: Byline Bank Honored as a U.S. Best-in-Class Employer by Gallagher
summary: Gallagher’s benchmarking analysis highlights organizations leading the way in employee and organizational well-being. headline: UK employee demand for income protection triples between age 20 and 59 - but only 24% of employers offer it, finds Gallagher
summary: New analysis from Gallagher, the global insurance and risk management consultancy, shows that as UK employees age, their benefit selections evolve from lifestyle focused offerings to protection and health-focused benefits in later life.

raw.headline: UK employee demand for income protection triples between age 20 and 59 - but only 24% of employers offer it, finds Gallagher
